section_miscategorizations.text: He reports positive tenderness to palpation of the medial epicondyle and pain with resisted wrist flexion and pronation. He also reports pain with wrist extension against resistance.
section_miscategorizations.reason: These are exam-type findings (tenderness to palpation and pain with specific resisted maneuvers) that would normally be documented as objective physical exam findings rather than as patient-reported symptoms, even though the patient experiences the pain.
